content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.02%, IT crashing -3.85%, India VIX +3.6% to 19.26 — risk-off tone with broad selling. PSU Bank, Pharma, Metal, Realty all red. Defensive rotation into Chemicals and Defence visible but breadth is poor. Book is 67% deployed with -0.34% session P&L; deployment hysteresis dictates default to NO_ACTION on new entries unless setup is exceptional.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down -6.7% but still above current SL of 75.00 (CMP 76.04). Q4 was strong (PAT +35%, NII +18.8%, CASA 52.5%, HDFC Sec Buy Rs 90, Systematix Rs 88) — thesis intact. Stock rallied to 52-wk high then profit-booked. Let SL of 75 do its job; holding above 75 = thesis intact, breach = exit. No MODIFY since SL is appropriate; tightening further into PSU bank weakness today risks getting stopped on noise."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 985.00,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Up +4% with strong Q4 (PAT +19%, GNPA <1%, MOFSL Buy, consensus target 1081-1203). Trailing SL up to 985 = breakeven+1 to lock in capital protection on this winner. Still gives ~3.5% room from CMP 1023. Target 1100 retained — consistent with consensus low-end."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive gold position -1%, well above SL 119. With VIX rising and US-Iran ceasefire fragile, gold remains a portfolio hedge. Hold structure intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1405.00,
      "new_target": 1520.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Near 52-wk high after blockbuster Q4 (PAT +27%, revenue +23%, margin 26.3%). Tightening SL slightly from 1400 to 1405 to reduce risk while giving room for FMCG defensive bid to play out. Stock is showing relative strength on a -1% Nifty day."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Near 52-wk high, +0.1% only. SL 1049 is right at entry — already at breakeven. Q4 audited results board meeting Apr 25-27 is binary event risk. Stock made high of 1079 today and faded — caution. Will not tighten further as 1049 SL is already locked at breakeven; need to give room through results event."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "+0.4%, SL 675 is tight (~1.3% below CMP). Q4 results Apr 29 is binary — current SL appropriate. No need to modify; already at near-breakeven protection."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Down -1.9%, SL 2260 still ~3% below CMP. Q4 results Apr 30 — let SL hold; thesis (FMCG defensive rotation) still valid. Don't tighten in a position already in red."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Down -1.2%, SL 388 (~3% below CMP). Q4 May 15. Power demand seasonal tailwind intact. Hold SL where it is."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HSCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +8.33% intraday after a 4-session +23% rally to fresh 52-wk high. Chasing a parabolic move on a -1% Nifty day with VIX rising is poor risk-reward. Better to wait for a pullback to 540-550 zone. Earnings concall Apr 27 — wait for the dust."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "EMCURE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Near all-time high with social-media controversy overhang and 55% Poviztra price cut pressuring margins. Bearish MACD crossover noted. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "COCHINSHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +5.22% intraday but stock still 35% off 52-wk high. Defence theme strong but adding a parabolic intraday mover into a 67%-deployed book on a risk-off day = poor entry timing. Hysteresis rule applies."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strong fundamentals but extended chart (+30% YoY, near consensus) and cluster risk with COCHINSHIP if I were to add both. Q4 board meeting Apr 27-28 — wait for results; don't chase intraday."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "MRPL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 board meeting TODAY — buying into a binary event with high crude/rupee uncertainty is not disciplined. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ATUL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 board meeting TODAY. Trading window closed. US tariff headwind on key exports. Binary event — pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "CLEAN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.3,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Bearish fundamental trend (revenue -13% YoY, near 52-wk low, China oversupply). The 12.8x volume could be distribution as easily as accumulation. Pass."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 75.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at 75 is 1.4% below CMP and thesis intact post Q4 beat. Let it work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 985.00,
      "reasoning": "Move SL to breakeven+1 after +4% gain on strong Q4."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1405.00,
      "reasoning": "Modest tighten as stock holds near 52-wk high on weak market day."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1049.00,
      "reasoning": "Already at breakeven; results event Apr 25-27 needs room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 675.00,
      "reasoning": "Tight SL already; Q4 Apr 29 needs room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2260.00,
      "reasoning": "In red; SL appropriate; results Apr 30."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 388.00,
      "reasoning": "Modest red; let thesis play through summer demand season."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "GRSE and COCHINSHIP — wait for Q4 results next week and any cooler entry on pullback. HSCL — watch for retest of 540-550 breakout zone. PNBHOUSING — strong winner, will look to add on pullback to 990 if structure holds.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 67% deployed with multiple binary earnings events stacked Apr 25-30 (AUBANK Apr 25-27, GRANULES Apr 29, HINDUNILVR Apr 30, NESTLEIND already done). This is significant event-density risk on existing positions. The right move today is risk management on what we already own — no new entries while VIX rising, Nifty -1%, and IT collapsing. Cash buffer of 33% is appropriate insurance into the earnings cluster. PSU bank cluster (MAHABANK + AUBANK) and FMCG cluster (NESTLEIND + HINDUNILVR) are at acceptable weights. No further additions to these clusters."
}
